title: Ethereum Foundation Overhauls Structure for Future Growth
summary: The Ethereum Foundation (EF) has completed a major reorganization to better execute its mission. The changes include new teams and a clearer focus on key projects, aiming to support Ethereum's long-term development. The EF now has a more streamlined structure to tackle critical tasks ahead.
body:
The Ethereum Foundation (EF) has concluded a months-long reorganization process, implementing changes outlined in its Mandate and Treasury Management Policy. The new structure is designed to better align the foundation's activities with Ethereum's long-term goals, ensuring efficient execution of critical tasks.

The reorganization includes the formation of new teams and a clearer focus on key projects. The EF has emphasized the importance of having the right people and activities in place to support Ethereum's growth. This restructuring is part of a broader effort to ensure the foundation can effectively manage its resources and initiatives.

For everyday users, this means that the Ethereum ecosystem is likely to see more coordinated and focused development efforts. The new structure aims to streamline processes, making it easier for developers and projects to receive support and resources from the EF. This could lead to faster innovation and more robust infrastructure for the Ethereum network.

The EF has also highlighted the importance of transparency and community involvement in this process. The foundation has stated that it will continue to engage with the Ethereum community to gather feedback and ensure that the new structure meets the needs of all stakeholders. Users can expect more updates and opportunities to participate in the foundation's activities as it moves forward with its new organizational framework.

The EF's reorganization includes new teams and a focus on critical tasks, aiming to streamline processes and support developers. This could lead to faster innovation on the Ethereum network.

For users, this means more coordinated development efforts. The EF is also emphasizing transparency and community involvement. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-26-ethereum-foundation-overhauls-structure-for-future-growth
standaloneTweet: The Ethereum Foundation's new structure aims to streamline development and support the network's growth. Expect more coordinated efforts and faster innovation.
